name: Turtle Shield
description: Turtle Shields are Pangolin models that trade maximum health for a much larger shield capacity. They suit characters who prefer a bigger shield pool and can play around the health loss with defensive skills, damage reduction, or careful positioning.
notes: At higher levels the reduced health can be the main drawback. They work best in builds that can restore, buffer, or otherwise compensate for the lower maximum health.

special.description: Greatly increases shield capacity but reduces maximum health.
